headline: CONFIRMED AT THE BORDER
subheading: The post-Brexit role that lets approved medicines reach Great Britain without re-testing.
flux_prompt: Abstract editorial composition evoking a controlled pharmaceutical import gateway into Great Britain: a luminous teal-cyan threshold or border-checkpoint arch rendered as glowing geometric lines, through which a single sealed medicine carton passes along a polished deep navy conveyor path; a verified certification seal motif glows softly where the carton crosses the threshold, suggesting documented approval rather than re-inspection; faint cartographic outline of a coastline and a dotted shipping route flow from offshore toward the gateway, implying an approved overseas supply chain; layered translucent panels echo a verified audit trail and batch documentation, with delicate connecting nodes; a single fresh-green status indicator marks the cleared, confirmed batch; cinematic shallow depth of field, soft directional lighting from the left, pristine clinical-luxury atmosphere, authoritative and trustworthy mood, deep navy base with teal and cyan tones and a subtle fresh-green accent, 1500x900 composition, 5:3 aspect ratio, professional editorial illustration, premium quality, clean composition, modern visual storytelling, professional lighting, no text, no watermark, no logo, ultra detailed
